name: dLocal
description: dLocal — LatAm and emerging market payment gateway covering 40+ countries with local card acquiring, bank transfers, and wallets.

seo.title: dLocal — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: dLocal: dLocal — LatAm and emerging market payment gateway covering 40+ countries with local card acquiring, bank transfers, and wallets.

when_to_use: Local card acquiring and bank transfer payments across 40+ EM countries
PIX, OXXO, and Boleto acceptance for LatAm and global platforms
Single API integration for payments in Brazil, Mexico, India, Nigeria simultaneously
Cross-border settlement from emerging markets to USD/EUR treasury

review.verdict: Still one of the widest emerging-market gateways — just vet the governance and pricing carefully before signing.
review.best_for: Global merchants needing LatAm, Africa, and Asia local methods in one API
review.not_for: SMBs wanting self-serve pricing and fast onboarding

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Usage-based pricing scales up and down
